creator: saper@system.pl
text:
mksh install fails being unable to find pkg-install

Port maintainer (miwi@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

How-To-Repeat: 
% sudo make install     
===>  Extracting for mksh-R33b
=> MD5 Checksum OK for mksh-R33b.cpio.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for mksh-R33b.cpio.gz.
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/obj/usr/ports/shells/mksh/work
cd /usr/obj/usr/ports/shells/mksh/work &&  /usr/bin/gzcat /usr/ports/distfiles/mksh-R33b.cpio.gz | /usr/bin/cpio -id
1695 blocks
===>  Patching for mksh-R33b
===>  Configuring for mksh-R33b
===>  Building for mksh-R33b
cd /usr/obj/usr/ports/shells/mksh/work/mksh && CFLAGS="-O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=nocona" CC="cc" LDFLAGS="" CPPFLAGS="" SHELL=/bin/sh /bin/sh /usr/obj/usr/ports/shells/mksh/work/mksh/Build.sh -q -r
| FreeBSD radziecki.saper.info 7.0-STABLE FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE #3: Wed Mar 26 00:33:58 CET 2008     saper@radziecki.saper.info:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VAIO  amd64
| amd64-undermydesk-freebsd gcc4.2.1
===>  Installing for mksh-R33b
pkg-install: Can't open pkg-install: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2
==>  Installing for mksh-R33b
pkg-install: Can't open pkg-install: No such file or directory
